title: Empty Bathtub Fashion Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Empty Bathtub Fashion Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 9:16 ultra-realistic empty-bathtub fashion portrait built around adult woman with natural hair and quiet introspective expression, oversized cream knit sweater and soft ivory slip skirt, and clean minimal white bathroom with empty dry bathtub and soft window light. Subject: adult woman with natural hair and quiet introspective expression is fully styled in oversized cream knit sweater and soft ivory slip skirt, curled inside a clean empty bathtub with quiet expression, natural hair, realistic fabric detail, and tasteful editorial restraint. Scene: clean minimal white bathroom with empty dry bathtub and soft window light keeps the bathroom clean, minimal, private, dry, and softly lit as a fashion-editorial location. Composition: side-lying curled pose inside the dry bathtub with naturally bent legs and tasteful fashion-editorial posture; fixed side-lying curled pose, natural hands and legs, tasteful bathtub geometry, soft window light, and vertical fashion-editorial framing. Signature Elements: Empty clean white bathtub, fully clothed curled side-lying adult fashion pose, soft window light, quiet expression, minimal private bathroom, and tasteful editorial mood. Style: Soft cinematic ultra-realistic fashion portrait with low-saturation colors, natural shadows, clear details, private editorial mood, and real fabric texture. Color Palette: Fixed clean white bathtub, low-saturation bathroom neutrals, soft window-light highlights, natural skin tones, and muted wardrobe-native fashion color. Lighting: Soft window light with natural shadows, gentle skin and fabric highlights, clean bathroom brightness, and subtle cinematic depth. Camera: Vertical 9:16 portrait framing with readable curled pose, tasteful crop, clean minimal background, and coherent bathtub perspective. Materials: oversized cream knit sweater and soft ivory slip skirt remains tactile with real fabric detail, white bathtub enamel, bathroom tile or wall softness, natural hair, and realistic skin texture. Restrictions: Keep the image fully clothed, dry, fashion-editorial, tasteful, anatomically coherent, softly lit, minimal, and focused on fabric, pose, bathtub geometry, and quiet mood.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Restrictions: Keep the image fully clothed, dry, fashion-editorial, tasteful, anatomically coherent, softly lit, minimal, and focused on fabric, pose, bathtub geometry, and quiet mood.
